ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the organization was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "investor_type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., VC, PE, Angel) */,
  "focus_areas" TEXT /* Focus areas of the organization (e.g., fintech, AI, blockchain) */,
  "aum" REAL /* Assets under management (AUM) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio company */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* API URL for data integration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the company's logo */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the company */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags related to the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization making the investment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio company receiving the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date the investment was made */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the investment */,
  "investment_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the investment (e.g., Seed, Series A, Series B) */,
  "expected_return" REAL /* Expected return on the investment */,
  "valuation" REAL /* Valuation of the company at the time of investment */,
  "pre_money_valuation" REAL /* Pre-money valuation of the company */,
  "post_money_valuation" REAL /* Post-money valuation of the company */,
  "ownership_percentage" REAL /* Ownership percentage in the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio company */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Market Cap, Revenue, User Growth) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_performance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio company */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "contact_position" TEXT /* Position of the contact within the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio company */,
  "reporting_period" TEXT /* Reporting period (e.g., Q1 2023, FY 2023) */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company during the reporting period */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company during the reporting period */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow of the company during the reporting period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio company */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., Crunchbase, Forbes, CB Insights) */,
  "ranking_value" INTEGER /* Value of the ranking (e.g., 3183) */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date the ranking was recorded */,
  "ranking_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking (e.g., Crunchbase) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_rankings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Investment Analyst, Portfolio Manager, Admin) */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource accessed (e.g., company, investment, financial) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_api_endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API endpoint */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio company */,
  "endpoint_url" TEXT /* URL of the API endpoint */,
  "endpoint_description" TEXT /* Description of the API endpoint */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the API endpoint was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API endpoint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API endpoint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_api_endpoints_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_notes_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio company */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., pitch deck, financial statements) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_documents_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio company */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id")
)
